# Plan: Platform Independence + GST Invoice + QStash Crons

## TL;DR
Replace `vercel.json` crons with Upstash QStash (platform-independent); add full GST tax invoice system (SAC 998431, CGST/SGST/IGST); add payment failure email; fix all Prisma type errors caused by stale client (root cause: `prisma db push` was never run against the DB, so client still lacks `otpCode`/`otpExpiresAt`/`EmailLog`).

---

## Phase 1 ‚Äî Fix Root Cause: Stale Prisma Client
**Blocker for all other phases.** The schema has `otpCode`, `otpExpiresAt`, `EmailLog` but the generated client doesn't know about them ‚Üí 15 type errors.
1. `npx prisma db push` ‚Äî apply schema to database
2. `npx prisma generate` ‚Äî regenerate typed client

## Phase 2 ‚Äî Schema Additions
*Depends on Phase 1*
3. Add to `Purchase` model: `invoiceNumber String? @unique @map("invoice_number")`, `gstData Json? @map("gst_data")`
4. Add to `GuestPurchase` model: same two fields
5. Add `PaymentAttempt` model
6. Re-run `prisma db push` + `prisma generate`

## Phase 3 ‚Äî New Lib Files (parallel)
*Parallel: all independent*
7. Create `src/lib/gst.ts` ‚Äî `calculateGST()`, `SELLER_STATE`, `GST_RATE`
8. Create `src/lib/invoice.ts` ‚Äî `generateInvoiceNumber()` using Prisma count

## Phase 4 ‚Äî New + Updated Email Templates (parallel)
*Parallel with Phase 3*
9. Create `emails/PurchaseInvoice.tsx` ‚Äî full GST tax invoice
10. Create `emails/PaymentFailed.tsx` ‚Äî dark red themed, retry link
11. Update `emails/WelcomeEmail.tsx` ‚Äî add `referralCode` prop, show prominently

## Phase 5 ‚Äî Update email.ts (depends on Phase 3+4)
12. Add imports for PurchaseInvoice, PaymentFailed
13. Add `sendPurchaseInvoiceEmail(email, name, invoiceProps)`
14. Add `sendPaymentFailedEmail(email, name, productTitle, amount, reason, retryUrl)`
15. Update `sendWelcomeEmail(email, name, referralCode)` signature

## Phase 6 ‚Äî QStash: Replace vercel.json (parallel with Phase 3+4)
16. `npm install @upstash/qstash`
17. Create `src/lib/qstash.ts` ‚Äî Client init + `registerCronJobs()` helper
18. Rewrite cron route: change from GET+Bearer to POST+`verifySignatureAppRouter`
19. Delete `vercel.json`
20. Update `.env.example` with QSTASH_TOKEN, QSTASH_CURRENT_SIGNING_KEY, QSTASH_NEXT_SIGNING_KEY

## Phase 7 ‚Äî Update Payment Routes (depends on Phase 2, 5)
21. `payment/verify/route.ts`: call `generateInvoiceNumber`, `calculateGST`, `sendPurchaseInvoiceEmail`, Discord notify; store `invoiceNumber` + `gstData` in DB
22. `payment/webhook/route.ts`: same for `payment.captured`; for `payment.failed` ‚Üí create `PaymentAttempt` + `sendPaymentFailedEmail`

## Phase 8 ‚Äî Update auth/callback (depends on Phase 1+5)
23. Pass `referralCode` to `sendWelcomeEmail()` call

## Phase 9 ‚Äî Final Verify
24. `npx tsc --noEmit` ‚Üí zero errors

---

## Relevant Files
- `prisma/schema.prisma` ‚Äî add PaymentAttempt, fields to Purchase+GuestPurchase
- `src/lib/gst.ts` ‚Äî NEW
- `src/lib/invoice.ts` ‚Äî NEW
- `src/lib/qstash.ts` ‚Äî NEW
- `src/lib/email.ts` ‚Äî add sendPurchaseInvoiceEmail, sendPaymentFailedEmail, update sendWelcomeEmail
- `emails/PurchaseInvoice.tsx` ‚Äî NEW
- `emails/PaymentFailed.tsx` ‚Äî NEW
- `emails/WelcomeEmail.tsx` ‚Äî update to show referralCode
- `src/app/api/payment/verify/route.ts` ‚Äî add invoice + Discord
- `src/app/api/payment/webhook/route.ts` ‚Äî add invoice + PaymentAttempt + PaymentFailed email
- `src/app/api/cron/onboarding-drip/route.ts` ‚Äî convert GET‚ÜíPOST+QStash
- `src/app/auth/callback/route.ts` ‚Äî pass referralCode to welcome email
- `vercel.json` ‚Äî DELETE
- `.env.example` ‚Äî add QSTASH vars, remove CRON_SECRET

## Verification
1. `npx tsc --noEmit` ‚Üí zero errors
2. Trigger test payment ‚Üí confirm GST invoice email with correct tax breakdown arrives
3. Trigger payment.failed ‚Üí confirm PaymentFailed email + PaymentAttempt DB record
4. Hit `/api/cron/onboarding-drip` with valid QStash signature ‚Üí drip emails sent
5. Register new user ‚Üí confirm welcome email has referral code

## Notes
- `SELLER_STATE = 'Andhra Pradesh'` (configurable via env in future)
- GST is INCLUSIVE (not added on top): `taxable = paid / 1.18`
- SAC code 998431 for digital educational services
- Discord webhook optional ‚Äî guarded with `if (DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL)`
- QStash cron route must be POST (QStash sends POST requests)
- `vercel.json` deleted ‚Äî zero platform lock-in
